title: minecraft expansion
description: a mod that adds many swords,tools, some ores and mobs
body:
The mod includes first 5 elemental swords, fire, lightning, toxin, wither and obsidian. All have unique enchatnments and unique abilites once they reach their final stage. By playing the game normally you start obtaining the ores for the swords and achievements will then guide you to achieve the final swords through the recipies that will be unlcoked. Also there is a lightning bolt accompanied with the lightning sword,that strikes lightning on to any living entity when hit with the projectile.

Then there are the 2 special crafting tables that both have their respective functions.One is to combine vanilla swords together making a brand new combined sword. The other is for enchanting swords that can be crafted from vanilla equipment, like tnt, ender eye and heart of the sea. They all come with repsective abilities. Press shift to reset them or else they will bug out.

Other special items include the ice sword and dagger which freeze enemies except flying entities, the ceramic and normal dagger, the bat dagger and the cursed and healing sword. The cursed sword goes a lot of damage at the cost of you also taking damage. the healing ore fixes that by giving you regeneration once an enemy is hit for a short while. press shift to switch between the two once you have your healing ore on your off-hand.

Enhanced the vanilla experience by adding emerald,steel,ruby,copper,lazuli and redstone tools.
The last three come with their own exclusive enchantments. Also crafting mixed tools with the normal crafting table is possible like a double wood iron axe, these perticular items fucntion differently than the ones mentioned before with the 2 special crafting tables.Armor can now be crafted as of 1.5.0

2 hidden swords are in the game that can be obtained legitimately by playing the game or just by executing the /give command. They are both end game swords and the mod gives very few hints as to what you are supposed to do since i wanted to keep it as an endgame reward, so have fun with that.

3 new mobs were added, the nether zombie and the nether gladiator zombie which have their own spawners in the nether which have a chest that is able to be looted. They only appear in the nether in the nether wastes. Also the end zombie was added in later versions


The mod is meant to be played in survival.This mod also uses a recourse pack for versions of the mod older than 1.4.0 if you are playing on 1.19.4 or 1.20.1. **_For best experience play on 1.19.4, 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4_**

see images for more information 

Thank you everyone for 100 downloads :) (on curseforge)

START HERE:
-all the features you see in the trailers
